name: mako-loop
description: A principal-grade product-engineering loop for AI coding agents with durable coherence harnesses, boss/subagent orchestration, security and database-security review, hard done gates, implementation-grade research, and mode packs for websites, apps, games, launches, and app research/recreation.

interface.shortDescription: Force principal-grade product judgment before code ships.
interface.longDescription: Use MakoLoop when a project keeps widening, feeling unfinished, losing coherence across long tasks, or accumulating disconnected features, or when you need to research a world-class app and rebuild an original high-quality equivalent. It includes a durable coherence harness, boss/subagent orchestration with dedicated security and database-security review agents, hard done gates, implementation-grade research, and mode packs for polished websites, SaaS/product apps, games, launch readiness, and app research/recreation. It forces product compression, competitive research, architecture fit, negative work, implementation, proof, and ship/no-ship review while keeping the main session agent responsible for scope, integration, deploy decisions, and final completion.
defaultPrompt: Run boss/subagent orchestration for this build.
Produce implementation-grade research for this build.
